hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//;s/"$//'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(core/|examples/|tools/cli/)"; then echo "DOCS REMINDER: Modified source file. If this changes public behavior, update docs/status/ manifests and docs/ pages."; fi'
